case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. VS BIRD, MARC A.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $80.74 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,939.73 AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BIRD, MARC A.
